message:
refactor: complete FrankenLibC rename in source files and scripts

Completes the glibc_rust → FrankenLibC rename by updating all remaining
source files, test files, and scripts that reference the old naming.

Updated categories:
- ABI crate source files: Updated crate imports from glibc-rs-* to frankenlibc-*
- Benchmark files: Updated crate references
- Fuzz targets: Updated crate imports
- Harness source and tests: Updated all internal crate references
- Membrane source: Updated crate references
- Legacy crate files: Updated to frankenlibc naming
- Conformance crate: Updated internal references
- Shell scripts: Updated all glibc_rust/glibc-rs references to frankenlibc
- Integration test fixtures: Updated environment references

This completes the rename started in the previous commit, ensuring
the entire codebase consistently uses the FrankenLibC naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
